name: plainmark
description: A minimal monochrome WordPress theme for tech blog & portfolio.
author: Masaki Morito

scripts.ts:dev: esbuild src/ts/main.ts src/ts/navigation.ts src/ts/search.ts src/ts/code-copy.ts src/ts/code-language-editor.ts src/ts/reading-progress.ts src/ts/dark-mode.ts --bundle --outdir=assets/js --sourcemap --watch
scripts.ts:build: esbuild src/ts/main.ts src/ts/navigation.ts src/ts/search.ts src/ts/code-copy.ts src/ts/code-language-editor.ts src/ts/reading-progress.ts src/ts/dark-mode.ts --bundle --outdir=assets/js --minify
